---
title: Meeting 2
description: "Mission planning"
image: "../../../2_2_assets/drone.png"
date: 2025-04-03
categories: [data capture, H+S]
---

# Agenda
- [ ] progress overview
    + drone 101 certification
        - 4h of drone flight time (45 minutes in ATTI mode)
        - flight assesment requested for 20250409 --> waiting for confirmation
    + project management
      - setup zotero
      - setup github repo (if you give me your usernames, i can give you read access)
      - automated workflow to filter annotations and comments made in zotero
      - PostGIS DB --> won't use that
      - integrated ToDoist
      - created website / central hub:
          + from personal quarto template
          + from [online template](https://lukmayer.github.io/blog/posts/quarto_template/)
          + included features from previous projects
          + [restricted access](https://lukmayer.github.io/blog/posts/login/) (not super secure, but will do for this project) 
          + [Notes from kickoff-meeting](../1_meeting1/index.qmd) are now available 
          + enabled adding comments with [hypothes.is](https://hypothes.is); see how to add them in the [documentation tab](../../../1_9_documentation/index.qmd)
    + site mapping
      - inspected Kauri Glen Reserve (most abundant in Swamp Maire 15+ trees), Eskdale Reserve, Bushglen Reserve (was closed)
      - field data still to be shared (Qfield cloud)
    + started a bit of research on drone settings --> more to be done/see subsequent point
- [ ] all procedures to log H&S protocols required by AUT for field work
- [x] drone details
    + Multispectral
        - [Mavic 3 enterprise multispectral](https://www.ferntech.co.nz/dji-mavic-3-multispectral-care)
    + LiDAR
        - [Matrice 350 RTK](https://enterprise.dji.com/matrice-350-rtk/specs)
        - [Zenmuse L2](https://enterprise.dji.com/zenmuse-l2/specs)
- [ ] discuss specific settings for my data captures
    + Multispectral
        - 
    + LiDAR
        - capture as detailed as possible due (relatively small research sites)
        - collect all 5 returns (or at least 4)
        - AGL 70-100m
        - flight speed 50%/7.5ms [LiDAR guide](https://help.propelleraero.com/hc/en-us/articles/19384915723031-Mission-Planning-with-the-Zenmuse-L1-L2-for-Lidar-and-Photogrammetry)
        - Repetitive Scanning Pattern
        - forward overlap 70%
        - side overlap 50%
      
- [ ] organize if Rebecca/Graham will join for the first flight or other way how I'll be introduced to the drones.
- [ ] introduce you to my system of sharing meeting notes and adding feedback to drafts
- [ ] generative AI: do i need to document the use of it if i use it for tools support (e.g. this website)
- [ ] optional: quick demonstration of my workflow from reference management, adding annotations and sorting all annotations from multiple papers

# Meeting Notes

- viewshed analysis
- anaye 3rd year student as research assistant
- slight drop off in data after 
- create checklists for fieldtrips
- graham will order SD cards

## H+S

## Mission planning
non-repetitive scanning better than repetitive pattern

1. flight plans early next week
2. Dji flight hub (only able to upload kml)
3.    - use mavic 3 enterptise as drone (AUT ones not abailable)
        - log flights for each aerea
        DEM needs to be in WGS84 (use geoid hight)
16 & 17 April for data capture
(backup date is one week later)



## data analysis

- lok at treees above and below spray level (separate data at this line)

# Tasks generated from the Meeting

```{python}
#| echo: false

import sys
import os

# Add the directory containing 'my_module.py' to sys.path
module_path = os.path.abspath(os.path.join('../..'))
if module_path not in sys.path:
    sys.path.append(module_path)

# Now you can import the module
from todoist import fetch_todoist_tasks

fetch_todoist_tasks(labels=["meeting"], created_after="2025-04-01", created_before="2025-04-30")
```


# Recording

<!-- <div style="text-align: center;">
  <audio controls style="width: 100%;">
    <source src="transcripts_recordings/20250306.mp3" type="audio/mpeg">
    Your browser does not support the audio element.
  </audio>
</div> -->

# Transcript
